title: Jacquotha Soft Cotton Hand Towels in Pink Checkered - 4 Pack Lightweight Absorbent Towels for Hand Drying and Face Washing, Gifts for Women Girls, 29x13 Inches
features: Quick Drying & Absorbent: Our cotton hand towels offer soft luxury for hands and face
Elegance in Pink: Infuse your home or dormitory with enduring style through our chic checkered towels
Convenient 4-Pack: Stay well-supplied with these multipurpose and stylish face towels set
Not Standard Size: 29x13 inches hand towel strikes the ideal balance between functionality and portability

Care Instructions: Machine wash your bathroom towel on a gentle cycle with similar colors to preserve their freshness. Tumble dry on low and don’t bleach. Wash before use, and avoid contact between towels and sharp objects, like zippers, to prevent unraveling
description: Pink checkered hand towels 4-pack —Crafted from premium cotton, these hand towels redefine softness, making them perfect for both delicate facial care, hand drying, and household cleaning. Keep bathroom hand towels by the sink or carry towel on the go for a touch of luxury wherever you are. The lightweight design makes the quick drying towels ideal for the gym, pool, spa, travel, dorms, and more. Infuse a touch of sophistication into your space with our eye-catching pink towels, featuring a timeless checkered pattern. Enhance your bathroom aesthetics with the soft towel sets. Stock up on essentials with our 4-pack towels set, ensuring you always have a hand towel within reach. Ideal for families, guests, or anyone seeking cute hand towels for bathroom use.
